personal.name: Manivannan S
personal.summary: Experienced Full Stack Developer with 4+ years of demonstrated work experience in building scalable web and API applications across healthcare, e-commerce, and data migration domains. Proficient in Ruby on Rails, Python, React.js, Electron.js, Stimulus.js, AWS and Docker. Skilled in RESTful services, relational databases, and Agile development. I also mentor junior developers, conduct code reviews, and promote best practices to drive team growth and maintain high-quality, production-ready systems.

tasks: Contributed to and led multiple full-stack projects across healthcare, logistics, and sports domains, collaborating with cross-functional agile teams.
Designed and delivered scalable, production-ready solutions using Ruby on Rails, React.js, Python/Django, TypeScript, and AWS Cloud Services.
Provided technical ownership, code reviews, and mentoring support while driving best practices across projects.
Acted as the primary bridge between business stakeholders and the engineering team for key client engagements.
Managed specialized technical delivery, performed task estimation, and ensured high-quality feature delivery under tight deadlines.

projects.title: REACH24™
projects.description: Enterprise SaaS for fleet maintenance coordination used by major logistics companies.
contributions: Refactored monolithic Ruby on Rails codebase, improving reliability and test coverage.
Modernized legacy frontend by migrating views to React.js with component-based architecture.
Led implementation of critical features like Adhoc and standalone invoice generation.
Executed zero-downtime data migration between database tables.

projects.title: Stanford SOAR
projects.description: Mobile-friendly surgical video platform with ML-driven insights and AWS architecture.
contributions: Developed entire frontend using React.js, TypeScript, and TanStack Query.
Implemented AWS S3 Multipart Upload for 5GB+ surgical videos.
Built custom AWS Lambda functions for async video processing and clip generation.
Leveraged AWS API Gateway, CloudFront, and SQS for scalable architecture.

projects.title: Nestlé Health Science
projects.description: Enterprise platforms for healthcare including PureInsights and Patient Direct portals.
contributions: Built Staff Management Module for administration and role-based permissions.
Upgraded stack from Ruby 2.7 to 3.3 and Rails 6.7 to 7.2.
Designed custom ETL tool to migrate 18,000 records from Azure SQL to PostgreSQL.
Implemented multi-language support (CA, EN, UK, FR) and real-time cart interactions.

projects.title: Go Time Sports
projects.description: Real-time sports event tracking platform with web and desktop cross-platform apps.
contributions: Built cross-platform desktop app with Electron.js for offline result management.
Engineered notification systems using OneSignal, Sidekiq, and Redis.
Developed RESTful APIs with JWT role authentication and image uploads to S3.
Coordinated technical delivery and led architectural decisions for scalability.

achievements.title: Performance & Contribution
achievements.detail: Recognized for delivering high-impact features and consistent performance.

achievements.title: Spotlight Award
achievements.detail: Awarded for overall performance excellence, leadership in project execution, and commitment to product quality.

engagement.title: Knowledge Sharing Speaker
engagement.detail: Internal tech session on RSpec importance and best practices in test-driven development (TDD) for Ruby on Rails.

engagement.title: Tech Talk: Desktop Apps
engagement.detail: Comparative study of Electron.js vs Tauri, evaluating performance, security, and efficiency for cross-platform development.
